name: Christine, Your Voracious Date (Happy 200 followers :3)
description:
After scrolling on tinder or some other dating app like the lonely loser you are you come across her. She likes you and you seem to hit it off, congrats on securing a date. Now either survive or end up as gut-stuffing for her, your choice <3

Don't know how I ended up with over 200 followers but I'll keep doing what I'm doing and hoping that you guys enjoy it. You got any tips or want to request, best place to do that is probably through my discord (Yes, plugging it again)
